questions.question: What is the primary objective of the AI-based BharatGen model launched by the Science and Technology Minister in June 2025?
questions.option_1: To replace foreign AI tools used by Indian government agencies
questions.option_2: To provide cloud services for AI startups across India and Asia
questions.option_3: To advance AI across Indian languages and cultural frameworks
questions.option_4: To develop quantum computing using indigenous algorithms only

questions.question: Which Indian artist received the Asia Arts Pathbreaker Award at the 2025 Asia Arts Game Changer Awards, for her innovative contributions to contemporary art?

Which player was honoured with the 2025 Football Writers' Association Men's Footballer of the Year award?

questions.option_1: To change the colour of the passport cover
questions.option_2: To reduce the cost of passport production
questions.option_3: To increase the number of pages in the passport
questions.option_4: To enhance security and prevent identity fraud

questions.question: What is the primary goal of the 'MILAN 2025' naval exercise hosted by India?
questions.option_1: To promote maritime cooperation among friendly navies
questions.option_4: To build new submarines jointly with France

questions.question: In which year was the National Disaster Management Authority (NDMA) initially constituted under the Chairmanship of the Prime Minister of India by an executive order?

questions.option_1: Paras Defence and Space Technologies Ltd

questions.option_1: Ordered the Assam Human Rights Commission to investigate
questions.option_2: Ordered the Assam Human Rights Commission to transferred the cases to the CBI

questions.question: What was the Supreme Court's directive regarding the NEET-PG 2025 examination format?
questions.option_2: Conduct the exam in two shifts
questions.option_3: Conduct the exam in a single shift
